summary:
THE TIDAL WAVE AND HEAVENLY CHARIOTS: Brandon recounts a vision of a massive tidal wave on the edge of heaven, which the Lord described as the final push and an outpouring of glory. Brandon saw angels wearing Roman-style leather armor, helmets, and shin guards, holding spears and driving horseless chariots of fire. On the back of these chariots were perfectly wrapped boxes of various colors, which the Lord explained were unprecedented end-time giftings and mantles to be distributed to the church.

CREATIVE MIRACLES AND HEAVENLY PROVISION: Brandon describes seeing massive silos filled with various body parts, including legs, arms, noses, ears, and eyes of different colors and skin pigments, which angels prepared for creative miracles on earth. Furthermore, Brandon witnessed angels holding massive baskets filled with finances, gold, silver, and bicycles, which they dumped onto the earth to provide for people's needs.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND PERSECUTED BELIEVERS: Brandon details a vision of a rotating earth illuminated by lights representing saved souls. He observed streams of gold across Asia, specifically in China, North Korea, South Korea, Vietnam, and the Philippines. Brandon notes that Jesus had a tear in His eye, expressing that the gospel cost these believers greatly. The vision also encompassed the Middle East, Pakistan, and Saudi Arabia, highlighting the joy Jesus felt for those standing firm for the gospel amidst severe persecution.

MIRACLES IN MISSOURI AND THE UNPREDICTABLE REVIVAL: Brandon shares a distinct vision set in downtown St. Louis, Missouri, where an African-American couple prayed for a white man in a wheelchair. The man's healing triggered a shock wave of God's power, causing people in the radius to fall weeping and experience a radical change. The Lord compared this upcoming revival to popping popcorn in a pan, explaining to Brandon that the movement will be completely unpredictable, uncontrollable by humans, and widespread, similar to the Asbury college revival.

DIVINE HOTSPOTS AND THE FALL OF RELIGIOUS WALLS: Brandon explains that God pointed out specific revival hotspots from heaven, noting that despite demonic forces attempting to build strongholds around these areas, the revival will plow over them like a steamroller. Brandon mentions specific locations including Branson, Kentucky, the Eastern Seaboard, and the Carolinas. The Lord revealed that this revival will not be confined to traditional church buildings but will happen in public places like grocery stores and bus stops, ultimately bringing down religious denominational walls to create a unified body, comparable to the unity seen after the September 11 attacks.

THE CENTRAL AMERICA MIGRATION AND GLORY DOMES: Brandon reports a vision of millions of people migrating to the I-35 corridor in the central part of America following a great shaking and natural disaster. He observed fields filled with identical tents accommodating the masses. In these areas, Brandon saw massive glory domes containing pillars of light where instantaneous healings occurred, such as limbs growing back and blindness being cured, without any human intervention. The Lord told Brandon that unlike the tent revivals of the 1950s involving figures like A.A. Allen, God will not share His glory with any man in this final outpouring.

NORTH KOREAN LIBERATION: Brandon recaps a vision concerning North Korea, where he saw angels descending from the sky and stars falling upon the earth. The Lord stated that He is sending angel armies to bring salvation and liberation to the people of North and South Korea, freeing them from the oppression of their demonic government.
rawData: [May 24, 2024]-[The glorious outpouring - one last major move of God before His coming]-[https://youtu.be/jhEl1n6VJhs]-[Hey, good morning family. I'm excited. I have some things on my heart here. You know, I felt like I've jumped around so much through so many different videos that I need to make just one video right now. Some of this is just a recap; I'm just going over some things that I've already talked about, but I'm making this video for people about the end-time revival. I hope this blesses you. I know there's a lot of this that you all have already heard. Hopefully, it's not boring to you. I don't think talking about the glory of God is boring, but if this isn't what you want, I have tons of other videos down below you can watch. So here you go. I saw a massive wave on the edge of heaven, and it was looking like a massive tidal wave, and it was going like this. I asked the Lord—whenever this was right at the Tribulation when I went into Tribulation with him—I said, 'Lord, what is that massive wave?' And he said, 'That is a final last push.' It was like a glory over it; it was a last outpouring. It was like a full manifestation of the glory—a tidal wave of the glory of God was going to pour out over the earth—and he said, 'It's at its breaking point; it's about to dump over.' I saw behind the wave all these angels, and they had chariots of fire. They had no wings; they all had armor on. They all had these headdresses on—it looked like Roman headdresses, you know, with the thing right here—and it went down on their face like this. They had full armor on, and they had a kilt-like thing, and it was all leather on them, it looked like. They had these shin guards; they had all of it. They were all decked out. They had a spear in one hand, and they were holding the reins of the chariot of fire in the other, but there weren't any horses; it was a chariot of fire. On the back of the chariot, there was like a little box that had a present; it was a bow. Each one of these presents was perfectly made—it looked like a different color for every box—and it had a bow and a ribbon on it. I asked the Lord, 'What are those boxes on the back of those chariots of fire?' And he said to me, 'Those are end-time giftings that have never been seen on the earth before. Those are mantles that are going to be given—special giftings for the end-time church.' He said they're going to be distributed throughout the world. There were hundreds of chariots of fire; it was all behind the water, this massive wave, this massive outpouring. To my right, I could see silos, and there were these massive silos full of legs and eyes and body parts, and the angels of the Lord were getting ready to bring those body parts for creative miracles for the last outpouring of the Spirit of God upon this earth. I saw the angels, and it was full of legs and arms and noses and ears and eyes and everything you can imagine. I'm trying to tell you of anything that you ever believed, but there was not just one color of eye; there was brown eyes and green eyes and blue eyes and black eyes and all kinds of colors of eyes and all kinds of colors of skin and pigments. It was full of these parts. Then I saw the angels with massive baskets full of finances. I could see bicycles that people were believing for on the earth—which, you know, I heard somebody talk in the comments of my video saying that bicycles represent individual ministry; I don't know, it could be a type and shadow or something like that, I have no idea; all I know is that's what I saw—and I saw these baskets full of money: huge amounts of gold, huge amounts of silver. The angels were pouring it out on top of the earth, and they were dumping those baskets on the earth. Then I saw the Lord—he told me—and the earth was moving. Everybody wants to talk about a flat earth; it's not real, and flat earth is not... it's actually moving. I saw the earth, and the earth was moving before me, and it was massive, like we see on TV and stuff. It was moving, and I could see all of the lights on the earth. I said, 'What are those?' And he said, 'That's souls that are going to be saved in this last push for revival.' I'm showing this and I could see Asia, and there were streams of gold all through Asia—all in China and all in North Korea. There were souls, you could see them, and all in South Korea, Vietnam, and the Philippines. You could see it. Then I saw Jesus. He had a tear in his eye, and he told me, 'My gospel cost them something.' He said, 'Do you see what's going on in Asia?' And I said, 'Yes, Lord, I see it.' And it was so precious to his heart. He said, 'The gospel cost them something.' This was very precious to him. He could see the other people, but his heart was towards Asia a lot. I could see all throughout the Middle East and Pakistan and all those areas—the people who are being persecuted so hard for the word; Saudi Arabia, those places like that—I could see that, and his heart was so full of joy because people were standing for the gospel and getting born again, and it was a great sacrifice for them. Now I'm going to take you to another part. I saw another part of this last outpouring, and the Lord showed this to me, but this was at a separate time. I saw people in St. Louis, Missouri. He showed me Missouri, and I could see all the people gathered on a street corner. It was downtown St. Louis, and I could see a man in a wheelchair. There was an African-American man and his wife, an African-American woman, and they laid hands and prayed for this man in a wheelchair. He was a white man, and they laid hands on him, and the power of God hit him. The man stood up out of the wheelchair and got healed. Well, when it did, it sent—you know, whenever you see a shock wave of something—it went boom, like a shock wave in the spirit realm. Everyone around that radius of that area started falling out in the glory of God. The power of God was just knocking them down; they would just fall on their face. The power of God started falling in that area, and everyone around that area started weeping underneath the power of God, and they were all radically changed. They're all born again because of two people being obedient, a husband and a wife. They just prayed for a man and the power of God hit him and he got up, but everyone around there experienced the glory of God, and it was like a tidal wave of his presence all in that area. The Lord told me, 'What you're about to see is like...' He said, 'I want you to go in and watch popcorn pop in a pan.' So I got some popcorn kernels and some coconut oil and I threw it in there, and I was making it for my little girl. He said, 'Do you see those kernels?' They were boiling; they were moving around and sizzling, and they were getting ready—you could see they were about to pop, but you didn't know which one was about to pop. And he said, 'Do you see those kernels down there? You don't know which one's going to pop first, do you?' And I said, 'No.' He said, 'That's the way the end-time revival is going to be.' He said, 'It will not be controlled by humans; it will not be able to... you won't know where it's going to happen next.' He said, 'Because it's going to happen like popcorn.' He said, 'The next kernel's going to pop, the next kernel's going to pop.' And he said, 'That's the way it's going to be, just like the revival that happened at the college, Asbury.' He said, 'It's going to be like that; it will pop up and fade away, and people won't talk about it anymore.' But he said, 'It's going to happen like that.' And he said, 'At the beginning, it's just one little kernel and just one little thing, Brandon.' But he said, 'Watch it.' And then the next one, and then the next one, and then next thing you know, the whole pan's popping, popping, popping. There's so many going on that there's no way to know which one's going to happen next, but it's all popping until the earth was full of the glory of God and the popping of the popcorn—but it's the popping of the Holy Ghost, popping of revivals all throughout the world. You're not going to know which one is going to happen next, but the glory of God is going to manifest in a way that we've never seen it before, and it's going to radically change this world. I'm telling you, I've seen it: manifestations of the glory of God. He told me, and I saw his hand come out of heaven, and there were shafts of light. He told me, 'These will be major hotspots for the glory of God, for my presence in the last days.' And he said, 'You will know where the major hotspots will be, for there are great satanic strongholds that have tried to be built up around those areas because they know—they've seen it since the testing of time.' 'I've had these places picked out, Brandon.' He said, 'It's not just something new; I've known this is what I've predestined to come to pass, the manifestation of what I want for the last outpouring.' And there were these big dumb devils all gathered around those places, trying to chant, doing their stupid stuff, trying to stop the manifestation, trying to hold back the power and the manifestation of what God's trying to do. But oh, how are they so dumb! There's no one going to be able to stop this last move. I don't care how big you think you are; God is going to plow you over like a steamroller. There's nobody going to stop this revival; God's going to have his way in this earth. I saw Branson, Missouri—a great revival happening in Branson. I saw Kentucky. I saw it on the Eastern Seaboard, around the North Carolina and South Carolina area, all in through that area. I saw a great revival happening. It's not that it's not going to happen all over the place, but the Lord said, 'A lot of this last revival will not be inside of the major four walls of a building.' He said, 'I'm going to do it in Walmart. I'm going to do it in the grocery stores. I'm going to bring the great revival all throughout America and around the world, just in the streets, just in the parks, just in wherever I tell you—at a bus stop.' It doesn't have to be at a church. He said, 'It's going to be me manifesting in my people in a way that is like you were in the Book of Acts.' So, I saw it happening like that. I saw I-35 in the central part of America. I saw millions of people coming to the central part of America, and they were all coming by the millions. There were so many people that were coming here because of natural disaster—there's a big event that happens before the revival, a great shaking. There's a great shaking coming. So when this happens, I saw all these people coming to central parts of America. There's so many people there's no houses to rent, there's not enough hotels, so people have tents. The tents are all the same, so I know it has to be some kind of government-issued tent—unless the church buys them, I don't know. I don't want to assume; it's just me talking to y'all. There's fields full of tents, like the hippie movement of people coming just for the revival and trying to get a touch from the Lord. I saw glory domes. There were massive glory domes where these pillars of light were at, and everyone that comes into those glory domes—not one person touches them—they are healed by the power of God. They are touched by the power of God. I saw their arms grow out; they come through that glory dome and their arms or their legs or their eyes, everything instantaneously. If you're blind, you're healed by the power of God. It's a last... he told me, 'I will not share my glory anymore with man about what's about to happen.' He said, 'In the '50s and in the tent revivals, there was always a man there that got a lot of the glory.' They always like A.A. Allen and these people; they always say, 'Oh man, let's look at them.' He said, 'But Brandon, I will not allow that to happen anymore. I am going to get all the glory, all the praise, and all the honor, for I am a good God and I am a holy God, and there will be a major move of my presence upon this earth. I'm telling you all, I hope you're ready because we're about to see something that a lot of you never believed we would, but it's going to be a massive move of God. Now, will everybody see it? There'll be a lot of scoffers; there'll be a lot of people that mock it and try to come against it and say, 'This isn't a move of God.' There'll be the Pharisees in the corner with their little devil horns, saying, 'God's not doing anything in the earth; see, this is all made-up charismatic flakiness.' But the Lord told me, 'I am going to bring the walls of religion down.' There will be no Baptist, there will be no Methodist, there will be no Catholic or Church of Christ. He said, 'I'm going to make it into a unified body, all doing what God's called us to do, and that's to save the lost, bringing forth the harvest.' You know, I will describe it like this—and I said this before—it's similar to 9/11. Not saying it will be an event like 9/11, but it was similar how everybody was so patriotic and together, running to the churches when everybody was so freaked out whenever the Twin Towers happened and all the stuff with the terror. He said that there was so much unity there for about six months or so. This is the same kind of movement in the body of Christ that's going to happen again. It will be the same kind of move, but even greater. I wanted to give a recap of everything that the Lord has shown me about these revivals, about the massive things that happened in North Korea. A massive revival happened in North Korea. I saw angels coming out of the sky. I saw stars falling upon the earth, but the Lord said, 'I'm sending my angel armies, and they're coming down and getting all the people in North Korea saved and South Korea,' and they were bringing liberation for the people of North Korea from all their oppression of the demonic government there. I saw a massive amount of awesome stuff happening. Jesus Christ is fixing to do something huge, and I want you to be a part of it. If you're not born again, you need to get born again. If you're not filled with the Holy Ghost, you should get filled with the Holy Ghost. I'm going to pray for you. We're going to believe God; you're going to get baptized in the Holy Ghost. If you're believing for healing, let's start it today. Faith is now. It's not 'we're believing for...'; faith is an act. Faith is now. We're not going to believe for tomorrow because we're believing for it now. Now faith is the substance of things hoped for and evidence of things not seen. Now faith is not tomorrow; now is like my little girl says all the time: 'Daddy, we're believing for Megan's healing, not tomorrow, not the next day, but we're believing for it now.' We're believing for the manifestation now. We're believing for Megan to talk and do all the things that we need her to do now. My little girl says that all the time to me: 'Dad, we're not praying for tomorrow; we're praying for today.' Stretch your hands out right now; just believe it. Father, right now in the name of Jesus, I come before you boldly into that throne, and I say in the name of Jesus, these people are delivered. I bind and cast out every devil that's binding them, hurting them, or harming them in any way. Perversion of all kinds, I speak to you demonic strongholds: you come out of them now in Jesus' name! Be free from that demonic stronghold. Come out of their body now in Jesus' name. I curse you by the power of God, devil, and I say in the name of Jesus, you are free from that demonic stronghold. Come out of them in Jesus' name! You are free, for whom the Son has set free is free indeed. I speak healing and wholeness and deliverance over your bodies. I speak for blind eyes to be opened. I speak for ears to be opened right now. I speak for your heart to be restored. I speak for your legs and arthritis to go away. I speak for your brain and fogginess of thinking, and depression and anxiety and fear be broken off of your life! Strongholds be broken! I speak to asthma in people's bodies. I speak to chronic pain: I say go in the name of Jesus! I call you healed and whole and well by the power of the blood of Jesus. By his stripes, you're healed. By his stripes, you're whole, and I call you delivered from sickness and disease. I call you delivered from poverty and lack and not enough and barely getting by; I command it to go out of your life in Jesus' name! I call deliverance of finances. I call a harvest of finances into your life. Father, I believe we receive right now every need met, every bondage broken off of their lives in Jesus' name. Father, we thank you, Lord. You're an awesome God. You're faithful to do that which you promised. Father, I thank you, Lord, we stagger not at the promise of God through unbelief, but we're strong in faith, giving glory to God, being fully persuaded that what you've promised you're able also to perform. I thank you, Father, what you've promised us, Lord, you're able also to perform it. I'm believing for these people right now for deliverance in their bodies. I believe it, God; you're a healer. Have mercy on us. Just like blind Bartimaeus, we say, 'Jesus, Son of David, have mercy on us!' Just like the woman with the issue of blood, we press forth, we go through there, and we grab onto that hem of his garment, and as she said, 'If I could just touch his hem, I shall be whole.' Lord, we press for that hem right now. We call upon you, Jesus, and we ask you, have mercy on these people. Deliver them, Father. I thank you, Lord, that you've already healed their bodies, and we take authority over the sickness. We're not waiting for it to be done; we thank you for the manifestation, Lord. We thank you, Lord, for your deliverance. We take authority over the healing over their body. We speak to those things right now. We speak to the healing: be healed and whole and well by the power of the Lord; it's in us. We have authority; we have deliverance; we have the power and authority to lay hands on the sick and they shall recover. Thank you, Jesus. Thank you, Jesus, you set us free. Thank you, Lord. We have power and authority and dominion over all sickness, over all disease, and nothing shall by any means hurt us. You're a faithful God. We worship you. Oh, how he loves you and me. He gave his life; what more could he give? Oh, how he loves you. Oh, how he loves me. Oh, how he loves you and me. Father, you are beautiful beyond description, too marvelous for words, too wonderful for comprehension, like nothing ever seen or heard. Who can grasp your infinite wisdom? Who can fathom the depth of your love? You are beautiful beyond description, majesty enthroned above. I stand in awe of you. Holy God, to whom all praise is due, I stand in awe of you. Holy, holy is the Lord, for you are glorious and worthy to be praised. You're the Lamb upon the throne, and unto you we lift our voice and praise. You're the Lamb upon the throne. Just whisper, 'Holy is the Lord.' Whatever you need right now, the Master's here; receive it. I rebuke the sickness off of you right now in Jesus' name. Be healed of your sickness right now in Jesus' name. Deliverance over your bodies right now in Jesus' name. From the top of your head to the soles of your feet, you're delivered. Hallelujah. Lord, we love you. Rise and be healed in the name of Jesus; let faith arise in your soul. Rise and be healed in the name of Jesus; he will touch you and make you whole. I believe it. I felt the Holy Ghost move today. Believe him right now for your manifestation. Jesus comes to set you free. Touch him today; he loves you. Thank you for watching. Thank you for being a part of this family. God bless you; have a wonderful day.]
